doc_name: How we used Gemini to build Google I/O 2026

chunks.text: A collage of I/O-related images, including the Antigravity Coffee Co. pop-up, a colorful jellyfish and a still from the Timmy TPU video. The word AI repeats three times on the left of the image, and there are colorful icons, including a sparkle, as well.
chunks.doc_name: How we used Gemini to build Google I/O 2026
